title: eryngium humile
intro: Eryngium humile, also known as the creeping eryngo, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Eryngium genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium humile include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Eryngium humile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
